message:
feat(wa-core): add tclsh detection and improve idempotency checking

Two improvements to the wa-core crate:

1. crates/wa-core/src/policy.rs - Add tclsh to command tokens
   - Tcl interpreter can execute arbitrary code
   - Should be detected by the policy engine for injection prevention

2. crates/wa-core/src/workflows.rs - Enhanced idempotency checking
   - Refactored check_step_idempotency for better accuracy
   - Now checks step_id field directly in addition to result_data
   - Handles "send_text" result type by checking policy decision
   - Tracks both latest completed and latest started for same key
   - Uses is_none_or() for cleaner option comparison
   - More robust key matching logic across different log formats

These changes improve the workflow engine's ability to correctly resume
interrupted workflows and detect previous step completions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
